name: Donna Miller
bio: Donna Miller is listed as a Democratic candidate in the 2026 IL-02 congressional primary. She is a Cook County Commissioner and entered the open-seat contest. (Source: Shaw Local candidate list, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)
